Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-42012 affecting package gnutls for versions less than 3.8.13-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-42012 affecting package gnutls for versions less than 3.8.13-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package gnutls is earlier than 3.8.13-1, affected by CVE-2026-42012
